title: psoralea decidua
intro: Psoralea decidua, also known as Wolf's Bane or Western Goat's Beard, is a perennial plant that belongs to the pea family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Psoralea decidua include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Psoralea decidua often involve drying the roots and using them in teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
